languages.text: "Третий план предполагает формирование зоны отчуждения, возведение наблюдательных постов... словом, оставить ксеносов в гробнице в покое и создать запретную зону вокруг. С выделением части инфраструктуры и солдат на постоянную тайную стражу. Потерь мы не понесем, но это потребует высокого уровня секретности, так что живые и материальные ресурсы, переброшенные в "Клеть", можно считать все равно что уничтоженными".

"The third plan involves the creation of an exclusion zone and erecting observation posts... In short, leave the xenos in the tomb alone and create a restricted area around it. With a portion of the infrastructure allocated to it and soldiers assigned to a permanent secret guard. There will be no casualties, but it will require a high level of secrecy, so the human and material resources transferred to the 'Cage' can be considered as good as destroyed."
languages.original_text: "Третий план предполагает формирование зоны отчуждения, возведение наблюдательных постов... словом, оставить ксеносов в гробнице в покое и создать запретную зону вокруг. С выделением части инфраструктуры и солдат на постоянную тайную стражу. Потерь мы не понесем, но это потребует высокого уровня секретности, так что живые и материальные ресурсы, переброшенные в "Клеть", можно считать все равно что уничтоженными".

With a portion of the infrastructure allocated to it and soldiers assigned to a permanent secret guard. There will be no casualties, but it will require a high level of secrecy, so the human and material resources transferred to the 'Cage' can be considered as good as destroyed."

"The third plan involves the creation of an exclusion zone and erecting observation posts... In short, leave the xenos in the tomb alone and create a restricted area around it. With a portion of the infrastructure allocated to it and soldiers assigned to a permanent secret guard. There will be no casualties, but it will require a high level of secrecy, so the human and material resources transferred to the 'Cage' can be considered as good as destroyed."

"The third plan involves the creation of an exclusion zone and erecting observation posts... In short, leave the xenos in the tomb alone and create a restricted area around it. With a portion of the infrastructure allocated to it and soldiers assigned to a permanent secret guard. There will be no casualties, but it will require a high level of secrecy, so the human and material resources transferred to the 'Cage' can be considered as good as destroyed."

languages.text: 「第三の計画は、墓の周りに除外区域を設け、監視哨を築くことだ。つまり、異星人を墓に放置し、その周りに立入禁止区域を作り、その一部のインフラを割り当て、常時秘密警備隊を配置する。犠牲者は出ないが、極めて高いレベルの機密性が必要となる。そのため、ケージに転送された人員や物資は、実質的に失われたものと見なせるだろう」
languages.original_text: "The third plan involves the creation of an exclusion zone and erecting observation posts... In short, leave the xenos in the tomb alone and create a restricted area around it. With a portion of the infrastructure allocated to it and soldiers assigned to a permanent secret guard. There will be no casualties, but it will require a high level of secrecy, so the human and material resources transferred to the 'Cage' can be considered as good as destroyed."

traits.locale_text: 「第三の計画は、墓の周りに除外区域を設け、監視哨を築くことだ。つまり、異星人を墓に放置し、その周りに restricted area を作り、その一部のインフラを割り当て、常時秘密警備隊を配置する。犠牲者は出ないが、極めて高いレベルの機密性が必要となる。そのため、Cage に転送された人員や物資は、実質的に失われたものと見なせるだろう。」

languages.text: «El tercer plan pasa por la creación de una zona de exclusión y la construcción de puestos de observación... En resumen, dejarles la tumba a los xenos y restringir la zona que la rodea. Dedicaríamos parte de la infraestructura a su establecimiento y destacaríamos soldados en una guardia permanente secreta. Apenas sufrirán bajas, pero dado el nivel de secreto necesario podemos dar por perdidos los efectivos y los recursos destinados a esta "jaula"».
languages.original_text: "The third plan involves the creation of an exclusion zone and erecting observation posts... In short, leave the xenos in the tomb alone and create a restricted area around it. With a portion of the infrastructure allocated to it and soldiers assigned to a permanent secret guard. There will be no casualties, but it will require a high level of secrecy, so the human and material resources transferred to the 'Cage' can be considered as good as destroyed."

traits.locale_text: «El tercer plan pasa por la creación de una zona de exclusión y la construcción de puestos de observación... En resumen, dejarles la tumba a los xenos y restringir la zona que la rodea. Dedicaríamos parte de la infraestructura a su establecimiento y destacaríamos soldados en una guardia permanente secreta. Apenas sufrirán bajas, pero dado el nivel de secreto necesario podemos dar por perdidos los efectivos y los recursos destinados a esta "jaula"».

languages.text: “方案三是建立隔离区并设立观测站……简言之，就是不管墓穴里的异形，但把周围封锁起来。这就需要专门建立基础设施，派驻永久任期的秘密守卫。此方案不会造成立即的人员伤亡，但要求高度保密。因此，派去那座'牢笼'的人手与物资，基本可视为永久损失了。”
languages.original_text: "The third plan involves the creation of an exclusion zone and erecting observation posts... In short, leave the xenos in the tomb alone and create a restricted area around it. With a portion of the infrastructure allocated to it and soldiers assigned to a permanent secret guard. There will be no casualties, but it will require a high level of secrecy, so the human and material resources transferred to the 'Cage' can be considered as good as destroyed."

traits.locale_text: “方案三是建立隔离区并设立观测站……简言之，就是不管墓穴里的异形，但把周围封锁起来。这就需要专门建立基础设施，派驻永久任期的秘密守卫。此方案不会造成立即的人员伤亡，但要求高度保密。因此，派去那座'牢笼'的人手与物资，基本可视为永久损失了。”

languages.text: "Der dritte Plan sieht die Ausweisung einer Sperrzone und die Einrichtung von Beobachtungsposten vor ... Sprich, wir lassen die Xenos selbst in Ruhe und riegeln die Umgebung um das Grab ab. Dann stellen wir einen Teil unserer Infrastruktur und einige Soldaten als permanente Geheimwache ab. Es wird keine Verluste geben, aber wir müssen für absolute Geheimhaltung sorgen, damit zu diesem 'Käfig' verlegte menschliche und materielle Ressourcen als so gut wie zerstört betrachtet werden können."
languages.original_text: "The third plan involves the creation of an exclusion zone and erecting observation posts... In short, leave the xenos in the tomb alone and create a restricted area around it. With a portion of the infrastructure allocated to it and soldiers assigned to a permanent secret guard. There will be no casualties, but it will require a high level of secrecy, so the human and material resources transferred to the 'Cage' can be considered as good as destroyed."

traits.locale_text: "Der dritte Plan sieht die Ausweisung einer Sperrzone und die Einrichtung von Beobachtungsposten vor ... Sprich, wir lassen die Xenos selbst in Ruhe und riegeln die Umgebung um das Grab ab. Dann stellen wir einen Teil unserer Infrastruktur und einige Soldaten als permanente Geheimwache ab. Es wird keine Verluste geben, aber wir müssen für absolute Geheimhaltung sorgen, damit zu diesem 'Käfig' verlegte menschliche und materielle Ressourcen als so gut wie zerstört betrachtet werden können."

languages.text: "Üçüncü plan, bir yasak bölge oluşturmayı ve gözlem noktaları dikmeyi içeriyor... Kısacası mezardaki zenoları rahat bırakıp etrafında kısıtlanmış bir alan yaratılacak. Altyapının bir kısmı buraya tahsis edilecek ve askerler kalıcı gizli nöbet için görevlendirilecek. Kayıp yaşanmayacak ancak yüksek düzeyde gizlilik gerektirecek, bu nedenle 'Kafes'e aktarılan insan ve malzeme kaynaklarının yok edilmiş sayılması gerekecek."
languages.original_text: "The third plan involves the creation of an exclusion zone and erecting observation posts... In short, leave the xenos in the tomb alone and create a restricted area around it. With a portion of the infrastructure allocated to it and soldiers assigned to a permanent secret guard. There will be no casualties, but it will require a high level of secrecy, so the human and material resources transferred to the 'Cage' can be considered as good as destroyed."

traits.locale_text: "Üçüncü plan, bir yasak bölge oluşturmayı ve gözlem noktaları dikmeyi içeriyor... Kısacası mezardaki zenoları rahat bırakıp etrafında kısıtlanmış bir alan yaratılacak. Altyapının bir kısmı buraya tahsis edilecek ve askerler kalıcı gizli nöbet için görevlendirilecek. Kayıp yaşanmayacak ancak yüksek düzeyde gizlilik gerektirecek, bu nedenle 'Kafes'e aktarılan insan ve malzeme kaynaklarının yok edilmiş sayılması gerekecek."

languages.text: « Le troisième plan consiste à créer une zone d'exclusion et à ériger des postes d'observation. Pour faire court, nous confinerions les xénos dans le tombeau et établirions une zone restreinte tout autour. Une partie de l'infrastructure y serait affectée, ainsi qu'une garde secrète permanente. Nous ne subirions aucune perte, mais ce plan nécessiterait un haut niveau de confidentialité. Autrement dit, nous tirerions un trait sur les hommes et les matériaux transférés vers la "Cage". »
languages.original_text: "The third plan involves the creation of an exclusion zone and erecting observation posts... In short, leave the xenos in the tomb alone and create a restricted area around it. With a portion of the infrastructure allocated to it and soldiers assigned to a permanent secret guard. There will be no casualties, but it will require a high level of secrecy, so the human and material resources transferred to the 'Cage' can be considered as good as destroyed."

traits.locale_text: « Le troisième plan consiste à créer une zone d'exclusion et à ériger des postes d'observation. Pour faire court, nous confinerions les xénos dans le tombeau et établirions une zone restreinte tout autour. Une partie de l'infrastructure y serait affectée, ainsi qu'une garde secrète permanente. Nous ne subirions aucune perte, mais ce plan nécessiterait un haut niveau de confidentialité. Autrement dit, nous tirerions un trait sur les hommes et les matériaux transférés vers la "Cage". »
